things.name: Varadero Beach
things.description: Cuba's finest beach - 20km of Caribbean white sand and warm turquoise water

things.name: Josone Park
things.description: Former sugar baron's gardens with lagoons, restaurants and leisure activities

things.name: Ambrosio Cave
things.description: Cave with 72 pre-Columbian cave paintings - oldest in Cuba

things.name: Varadero Golf Club
things.description: Cuba's only 18-hole golf course with ocean views

things.name: Cayo Blanco Catamaran Day Trip
things.description: Snorkelling on a pristine reef with lobster lunch on a deserted cay

things.name: Havana Day Trip
things.description: Colonial Havana is just 2.5 hours west - classic cars, rum and salsa

things.name: Saturno Cave (Cueva Saturno)
things.description: Dive or snorkel in a freshwater cave pool just outside Varadero

things.name: Mansion Xanadu
things.description: 1930s mansion of the Du Pont de Nemours family - now a luxury hotel and golf clubhouse

things.name: El Moro Restaurant
things.description: Fresh lobster and seafood in a thatched beach hut

things.name: Cuba Libre (Rum & Coke)
things.description: Havana Club rum and Coca-Cola - invented by US soldiers during the 1898 occupation
